raw_response:
{"to":["ee.procurement@auroraauto.com"],"subject":"Re: [TOE-001] PO-TOE001-<REDACTED_PHONE_1> — Order Acknowledgement","body":"Hello Aurora Automotive Electronics Procurement Team,

Thank you for your purchase order PO-TOE001-<REDACTED_PHONE_10>, referencing quote Q-AURA-<REDACTED_PHONE_11.

We have created your Sales Order Acknowledgment in our system under Salesforce Order ID 801dM00003m8kq6QAA (Order Number <REDACTED_PHONE_8>). Current status: Draft.

We have captured the corrected Ship-To as provided:
Aurora Automotive Electronics · Warehouse B
9100 Industrial Pkwy, Detroit MI 48201

Requested ship date: 2026-06-15
Payment terms: Net 30

Per your note, we will send the SOA at the earliest. We are currently validating the matched quote/line items and totals against the PO before releasing the SOA.

If anything has changed beyond the Ship-To correction, please advise.

Best regards,
Keysight Sales Operations"}

parsed.subject: Re: [TOE-001] PO-TOE001-<REDACTED_PHONE_1> — Order Acknowledgement
parsed.body:
Hello Aurora Automotive Electronics Procurement Team,

Thank you for your purchase order PO-TOE001-<REDACTED_PHONE_10>, referencing quote Q-AURA-<REDACTED_PHONE_11.

We have created your Sales Order Acknowledgment in our system under Salesforce Order ID 801dM00003m8kq6QAA (Order Number <REDACTED_PHONE_8>). Current status: Draft.

We have captured the corrected Ship-To as provided:
Aurora Automotive Electronics · Warehouse B
9100 Industrial Pkwy, Detroit MI 48201

Requested ship date: 2026-06-15
Payment terms: Net 30

Per your note, we will send the SOA at the earliest. We are currently validating the matched quote/line items and totals against the PO before releasing the SOA.

If anything has changed beyond the Ship-To correction, please advise.

Best regards,
Keysight Sales Operations
